title: SugarCraft — CandyFocus
description: CandyFocus: dependency-free focus ring — an ordered set of focusable regions with a single focused member and wrap-around Tab/Shift-Tab traversal for full-window TUI layouts.
ogDescription: Focus-ring state machine for full-window TUIs: register each focusable region, map Tab to next() and Shift-Tab to previous(), and accent-border the region current() returns. Immutable, dependency-free.
tagline: Focus-ring state machine — ordered focusable regions with Tab/Shift-Tab traversal
detailMeta: original — no upstream parallel focus layout navigation
